items.title: Tamil Nadu Fireworks Factory Blast
items.whyInNews: A blast occurred at a fireworks factory in Tamil Nadu's Virudhunagar district, resulting in 23 deaths.
items.summary: The blast occurred on April 18, 2026, at a fireworks factory in Virudhunagar district, Tamil Nadu. The Prime Minister of India, Narendra Modi, expressed condolences for the loss of lives. The incident is under investigation, and the cause of the blast is yet to be determined. The factory was located in a rural area, and the impact of the blast was felt in nearby villages.

The blast occurred at a fireworks factory in Virudhunagar district, Tamil Nadu
The Prime Minister of India, Narendra Modi, expressed condolences
The incident is under investigation

items.title: Election Commission Takes Action on Social Media Posts
items.whyInNews: The Election Commission of India took action on 11,000 social media posts ahead of the Assembly polls.
items.summary: The Election Commission of India (ECI) has taken action on 11,000 social media posts that were found to be in violation of the model code of conduct ahead of the Assembly polls. The ECI has been monitoring social media platforms to ensure that they are not used to spread misinformation or influence voters. The action taken by the ECI includes removing or blocking the offending posts and taking action against the individuals or organizations responsible for posting them.
keyPoints: The ECI took action on 11,000 social media posts
The posts were found to be in violation of the model code of conduct
The ECI has been monitoring social media platforms
The action taken includes removing or blocking the offending posts
importantPoints: The Election Commission of India was established in 1950 under Article 324 of the Constitution of India
The ECI is responsible for conducting free and fair elections in India
The model code of conduct is a set of guidelines that regulate the behavior of political parties and candidates during elections
The ECI has the power to take action against individuals or organizations that violate the model code of conduct
The use of social media in elections has increased significantly in recent years
items.examRelevance: This is relevant to the SSC exam as it highlights the importance of the Election Commission of India in ensuring free and fair elections.

items.title: Rajasthan to Get India's First Vande Bharat Sleeper Train Maintenance Depot
items.whyInNews: Rajasthan's Bhagat Ki Kothi will get India's first Vande Bharat Sleeper train maintenance depot.
items.summary: The Indian Railways has announced plans to set up a maintenance depot for the Vande Bharat Sleeper train at Bhagat Ki Kothi in Rajasthan. The depot will be the first of its kind in India and will provide maintenance and repair services for the Vande Bharat Sleeper trains. The Vande Bharat Sleeper train is a new type of train that has been introduced by the Indian Railways, which features advanced technology and modern amenities.

items.title: Census Portal Shows Arunachal Town as Chinese Territory
items.whyInNews: A glitch on the census portal showed an Arunachal town as Chinese territory.
items.summary: A glitch on the census portal showed an Arunachal town as Chinese territory, sparking concerns about the accuracy of the data. items.title: Tottenham Reports Racist Abuse of Defender Kevin Danso to Police
items.whyInNews: Tottenham has reported racist abuse of defender Kevin Danso to the police after their 2-2 draw with Brighton in the Premier League.
items.summary: The incident occurred during the Premier League match between Tottenham and Brighton, where Kevin Danso was subjected to racist abuse. Tottenham has condemned the incident, describing it as 'vile, dehumanizing racism'. The club has reported the incident to the police and is working to identify the individuals responsible. The incident highlights the ongoing issue of racism in football and the need for stricter measures to prevent such incidents.
